accountNotFound: We could not find an account for those credentials. Create an account to continue.
emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
confirmEmailBody: We sent you a confirmation link. After confirming, sign in to continue to payment.
checkoutDescription: Complete your subscription payment to access Systema.
checkoutAlreadyPaid: Your account is already marked as paid. Go to the dashboard to continue.
checkoutPaymentSuccess: Payment completed. Refresh the page after a few moments if the status has not updated yet.
checkoutPaymentCancelled: Payment was canceled. Use the button below to retry.
checkoutHelpText: Your payment will be processed with NOWPayments. Select Tether USD (USDT) on TRON network. If the invoice does not open, double-check your browser settings and try again.
checkoutUsdtNotice: Payments must be made in Tether USD (USDT) on TRON network only.
dashboardActiveBody: Your Systema scheduler is available. Create campaigns, queue posts, and monitor automation from the dashboard.
dashboardPaywallDescription: Complete your subscription payment to unlock the scheduler and advanced automation tools.
emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Sign in or request a password reset.
enterNewPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your Systema account.
resetPasswordSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
resetPasswordError: Unable to send reset email. Try again later.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage your account, subscription, access controls, and automation defaults.

api.title: API access
api.description: Generate and rotate API credentials for agent-to-Systema publishing once API access is enabled.

instagram.title: Instagram connection
instagram.description: Connect Meta or Instagram accounts, review permissions, and switch between sandbox and production modes.

security.title: Security
security.description: Change your password with your current password, or use the recovery flow if you forgot it.
security.changeError: Unable to update password. Try again later.
security.resetEmailSent: Password reset email sent to your account email.
security.resetEmailError: Unable to send password reset email. Try again later.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Account deletion and integration revocation will be added behind an extra confirmation step.

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.intro: These terms outline the expected use of Systema while the product is in active development.

access.title: Account access
access.body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity that happens through your account.

payments.title: Payments and subscriptions
payments.body: Paid access depends on successful subscription payment. If a payment fails or expires, access to protected product areas may be paused until payment is restored.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: Do not use Systema for spam, impersonation, illegal activity, platform abuse, or attempts to bypass security controls.

availability.title: Service availability
availability.body: Systema may change, pause, or limit features while integrations, API access, billing, and publishing workflows are improved.

liability.title: Limitations
liability.body: You are responsible for reviewing content, permissions, and connected accounts before publishing or automating workflows.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.intro: Get help with account access, billing, payments, and upcoming automation features.

billing.title: Billing
billing.body: For payment status, renewal, or invoice questions, include the email address on your Systema account and any invoice reference.

access.title: Account access
access.body: Use password reset for login issues. If email confirmation or recovery links fail, request help with the affected email address.

technical.title: Technical setup
technical.body: For API, Instagram, or automation issues, include the plan, browser, and the action you were trying to complete.

contact.title: Need direct help?
contact.body: Support intake is being centralized. For now, start from Settings so the team can match requests to your account state.

homeCarousel.cryptomusPlaceholder: NOWPayments payment options will appear here.

slides.title: The Autonomous Content Pipeline for Elite Brands.
slides.subtitle: Systema is an unblockable API bridge between AI agents and Instagram. Write, optimize, and publish on autopilot.

grid.title: Accelerated Path
grid.description: Direct Meta Sandbox; skip approval delays.
